title: Opening for Production Engineer at Baidyanath

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Baidyanath
jsonLd.description:
Baidyanath has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Chandigarh office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Baidyanath:
Baidyanath is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Baidyanath!
